additionalEventClass: =if([$ContentType] == 'SF Conference', 'sp-css-backgroundColor-BgCornflowerBlue sp-css-color-CornflowerBlueFont', if([$ContentType] == 'SF Call Milestone' && [$sfCallPhase] == 'Open', 'sp-css-backgroundColor-BgMintGreen sp-css-color-MintGreenFont', if([$ContentType] == 'SF Call Milestone' && [$sfCallPhase] == 'Close' && [$sfSubmissionStatus] == 'Planned' && Number([$EventDate]) < @now, 'sp-css-backgroundColor-BgDustRose sp-css-color-DustRoseFont', if([$ContentType] == 'SF Call Milestone' && [$sfCallPhase] == 'Close', 'sp-css-backgroundColor-BgGold sp-css-color-GoldFont', if([$ContentType] == 'SF Session' && [$sfSessionType] == 'Workshop', 'sp-css-backgroundColor-BgPeach sp-css-color-PeachFont', 'sp-css-backgroundColor-BgLavender sp-css-color-LavenderFont')))))
